message:
fix(grpc): make HealthReporter final-drop status clear atomic with reporter count release

The previous implementation had a TOCTOU race: release_reporter() would
return true indicating this was the last reporter, then the Drop impl
would separately call clear_status(). Between those two operations, a
replacement reporter could register and set a new status, which would
then be incorrectly cleared by the stale drop.

Fix: merge release_reporter() and clear_status() into a single
release_reporter_and_maybe_clear_status() method that holds the
reporter_counts write lock across both the count decrement and the
status removal. This ensures no replacement reporter can slip in
between count release and status clear.

Changes:
- Replace release_reporter() -> bool + separate clear_status() call
  with unified release_reporter_and_maybe_clear_status()
- Add _with_hook variant for deterministic testing of the race window
- Hold reporter_counts write lock across final-clear + status removal
- Add test: health_reporter_final_drop_does_not_clear_replacement_reporter_status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
